content.json:
## Web analytics — all sites
sherifalghali.com · randomtravelnotes.com · aos-technology.com in one Application Insights resource. Data before this dashboard's rollout is shown as **(untagged)** because per-site tagging started at deploy. Use the **Site** and **Time range** filters above.

content.query:
let pv = pageViews | extend RoleName = iif(isempty(cloud_RoleName), '(untagged)', cloud_RoleName) | where '{Site}' == 'All' or RoleName == '{Site}';
union
(pv | summarize Value = count() | extend Metric = 'Page views', o = 1),
(pv | summarize Value = dcount(user_Id) | extend Metric = 'Unique users', o = 2),
(pv | summarize Value = dcount(session_Id) | extend Metric = 'Sessions', o = 3)
| order by o asc
| project Metric, Value

pageViews
| extend RoleName = iif(isempty(cloud_RoleName), '(untagged)', cloud_RoleName)
| where '{Site}' == 'All' or RoleName == '{Site}'
| summarize Views = count() by bin(timestamp, 1d), Site = RoleName
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Page views over time, by site

content.query:
pageViews
| extend RoleName = iif(isempty(cloud_RoleName), '(untagged)', cloud_RoleName)
| where '{Site}' == 'All' or RoleName == '{Site}'
| summarize Views = count() by Site = RoleName
| order by Views desc
content.title: Traffic share by site

content.query:
pageViews
| extend RoleName = iif(isempty(cloud_RoleName), '(untagged)', cloud_RoleName)
| where '{Site}' == 'All' or RoleName == '{Site}'
| extend Page = iif(isempty(name), tostring(url), name)
| summarize Views = count(), Users = dcount(user_Id) by Page
| top 20 by Views desc
content.title: Top pages

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'ArticleView'
| extend RoleName = iif(isempty(cloud_RoleName), '(untagged)', cloud_RoleName)
| where '{Site}' == 'All' or RoleName == '{Site}'
| extend Title = tostring(customDimensions['title'])
| where isnotempty(Title)
| summarize Views = count() by Title
| top 20 by Views desc
content.title: Top articles (ArticleView events)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'ArticleEngagement'
| extend RoleName = iif(isempty(cloud_RoleName), '(untagged)', cloud_RoleName)
| where '{Site}' == 'All' or RoleName == '{Site}'
| extend EngagementType = tostring(customDimensions['engagementType'])
| summarize Events = count() by EngagementType
| order by Events desc
content.title: Engagement by type (scroll depth / time on page)

content.query:
pageViews
| extend RoleName = iif(isempty(cloud_RoleName), '(untagged)', cloud_RoleName)
| where '{Site}' == 'All' or RoleName == '{Site}'
| where isnotempty(client_CountryOrRegion)
| summarize Views = count(), Users = dcount(user_Id) by Country = client_CountryOrRegion
| top 20 by Views desc
content.title: Top countries

content.query:
pageViews
| extend RoleName = iif(isempty(cloud_RoleName), '(untagged)', cloud_RoleName)
| where '{Site}' == 'All' or RoleName == '{Site}'
| summarize Views = count() by Browser = client_Browser
| top 10 by Views desc
content.title: Browsers
